query: SELECT id, clientName, dealName, stage, serviceType, facility FROM pipelineDeals WHERE clientName LIKE '%Glazer%' OR clientName LIKE '%Cornerstone%' OR dealName LIKE '%Glazer%' OR dealName LIKE '%Cornerstone%' OR dealName LIKE '%PLCB%' OR dealName LIKE '%Southern%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user jfVduGqim3ALTGy.08e762350d2b --database jGMAb8b3KCDFhyaTLpjNrM --execute SELECT id, clientName, dealName, stage, serviceType, facility FROM pipelineDeals WHERE clientName LIKE '%Glazer%' OR clientName LIKE '%Cornerstone%' OR dealName LIKE '%Glazer%' OR dealName LIKE '%Cornerstone%' OR dealName LIKE '%PLCB%' OR dealName LIKE '%Southern%';
